# Studyatchina

> Your gateway to studying in China — browse top Chinese universities, scholarships, and degree programs.

## About

Studyatchina is a multilingual platform (English, Arabic, Persian, Turkish) that helps international students discover and apply to Chinese universities. We provide:

- University search and comparison across 300+ Chinese institutions
- Scholarship listings including CSC (China Scholarship Council) and university-specific scholarships  
- Degree program search by field, level (Bachelor, Master, PhD), and language of instruction
- Step-by-step application guidance
- Visa and admission support

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://studyatchina.com/en): Overview of services, featured universities and programs
- [Universities](https://studyatchina.com/en/universities): Browse and filter 300+ Chinese universities by location, ranking, and specialization
- [Programs](https://studyatchina.com/en/programs): Search degree programs by field, level, language, and tuition
- [Scholarships](https://studyatchina.com/en/scholarships): CSC scholarships, university scholarships, and government grants
- [How to Apply](https://studyatchina.com/en/how-to-apply): 6-step application process from profile creation to admission
- [Destinations](https://studyatchina.com/en/destinations): City and province guides for international students
- [Articles](https://studyatchina.com/en/articles): Guides, tips, and insights for studying in China
- [QS Rankings](https://studyatchina.com/en/qs-rankings): Chinese universities in global QS World University Rankings
- [FAQ](https://studyatchina.com/en/faq): Common questions about studying in China
- [Contact](https://studyatchina.com/en/contact): Get in touch for admission and scholarship inquiries
- [Download Guide](https://studyatchina.com/en/download-guide): Free comprehensive PDF guide to studying in China

## Languages

The platform is available in:
- English: https://studyatchina.com/en
- Arabic: https://studyatchina.com/ar
- Persian: https://studyatchina.com/fa
- Turkish: https://studyatchina.com/tr

## Topics Covered

- Chinese university admissions for international students
- CSC (China Scholarship Council) scholarship application process
- MBBS (Medicine) programs in China taught in English
- Engineering, Business, Computer Science, and Arts programs
- Student visa (X1/X2) requirements and application
- Cost of living and tuition fees in Chinese cities
- Campus life and student experiences
- QS World University Rankings for Chinese universities
